name: Voice (Native)
description: OS-native audio device listing and speech synthesis (say on macOS, spd-say/espeak on Linux, PowerShell SpeechSynthesizer on Windows).
author: Rove HQ

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List available audio input and output devices.

tools.name: test_output
tools.description: Speak text through the system default audio output.
